message:
feat(python): numpy.nanmean wrapper parity (franken_numpy-35ha)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.nanmean covering axis, explicit
dtype, `out=` destination, and keepdims. Test covers no-NaN 1-D
(matches mean), 1-D with NaN (ignores NaN), 2-D axis=0/1 with mixed
NaN, fully-NaN slice returning NaN under silenced warnings, integer
input, dtype=float32 promotion with dtype parity, and keepdims shape
parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
